root_cause: Referenced ConfigMap is missing a required key
evidence: Missing ConfigMap key surfaces across multiple kubelet startup checks

causes.message: Required key 'app.yaml' does not exist in ConfigMap 'app-config'
Kubelet cannot resolve required ConfigMap-backed configuration for startup

likely_causes: ConfigMap key name typo in an env or volume item reference
ConfigMap was updated and no longer includes the expected key
Workload manifest expects configuration data that was never populated
suggested_checks: Review configMapKeyRef and configMap volume item keys in the Pod spec
